title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 208.425 - Welfare reform coordinating committee established
text:
208.425.  Welfare reform coordinating committee established. — There is hereby established in the department of social services a "Welfare Reform Coordinating Committee" to assist in the development of regional and state implementation plans for welfare reform.
(L. 1989 1st Ex. Sess. H.B. 2 § 6) 
Effective 7-27-89
